News

Istanbul Okan University is now in the 2025 UI GreenMetric World University Rankings

08
						December

2025

We are proud to be one of the 1,745 universities included in the 2025 UI GreenMetric World University Rankings, where Istanbul Okan University placed 13th among foundation universities in Türkiye.

In this global ranking, which evaluates sustainability initiatives and green space ratios on university campuses, we achieved significant success thanks to our strong performance in key criteria such as infrastructure, energy efficiency, waste management, transportation, education, and research.
